name: HRC_DL_BUS_COMM_ATTRS_VL
query: SELECT B.BUS_COMM_ATTR_ID BUS_COMM_ATTR_ID, T.ATTRIBUTE_LABEL ATTRIBUTE_LABEL, T.ATTRIBUTE_DESCRIPTION ATTRIBUTE_DESCRIPTION, B.COMMON_KEY COMMON_KEY, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRC_DL_BUS_COMM_ATTRS_B B, HRC_DL_BUS_COMM_ATTRS_TL T WHERE B.BUS_COMM_ATTR_ID = T.BUS_COMM_ATTR_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
